subcodes.title: Kitabu’l-Javad
subcodes.first_line: By God, the Most Bountiful, the Most Bountiful! Through the bounty of God, the Most Bountiful, the Most Bountiful! Say: O God! Verily Thou art the All-Bountiful One of the heavens and the earth and whatsoever lieth between them [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الاجود الاجود. بالله الله الاجود الاجود بجود الله الاجود الاجود قل اللهم انک انت جواد السموات و الارض و ما بینهما
subcodes.subjects: @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @He Whom God Shall Make Manifest; the Bab and Baha'u'llah, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Word of God the cause of creation, @power of the Manifestation of God
